dataSource.note: Community-sourced (APK bundles encrypted; see tools/extract/ENCRYPTION-FINDINGS.md). Held-item values at max level 30. Percentages stored as decimals.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies and lowering their Defense by 15% for 2s when it hits. If this boosted attack hits only a single target, it deals increased damage.

moves.name: Feint
moves.description: Dash in an arc, attacking enemies that come in contact with Absol. This move ignores the defense stat and shield effects of enemies.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.description: Dash in an outward arc, dealing damage to enemies. If this first attack hits, a second attack can also be performed. The second attack has the user dash straight ahead, dealing damage to enemies and increasing the user's critical-hit rate. The lower the enemies HP, the more the user's critical-hit rate is increased.

moves.name: Pursuit
moves.description: Dash to the designated location and quickly charge an enemy with the next basic attack. (Basic attack range is doubled while this effect is active). If the basic attack lands from behind, its damage is increased and this move's cooldown is reduced.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Slash with sharp claws in front of the user, increasing this move's critical-hit rate.

moves.name: Psycho Cut
moves.description: Attack with blades formed by psychic power that decrease the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits. Also increases basic attack damage dealt to the affected enemy for up to 3 attacks after this move hits.

moves.name: Sucker Punch
moves.description: Look for an opening to attack an enemy, decreasing the movement speed of the user and the target enemy for the duration. After a short time, charge forward to attack the enemy. However, if the user receives damage or gets attacked before it charges, attack immediately and shove the enemy.

moves.name: Midnight Slash
moves.description: Unleashes a flurry of slashes in front of the user. This move ends by unleashing powerful blades of energy, dealing increased damage to enemies and shoves them.

passiveAbility.name: Super Luck
passiveAbility.description: Increased Critical-Hit rate by 15%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Slash at enemies in front of Aegislash, dealing damage to them. If the boost count is one or more, basic attacks become a boosted attack. When in Blade Stance: pierce through enemies, dealing damage. When in Shield Stance: ram enemies, dealing damage and leaving them unable to act for a short time, restore HP, and reduce the cooldown of Sacred Sword and Shadow Claw when this attack hits. Every boosted attack consumes one boost count. Up to 4 boosted boosted attacks can be stored.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.description: Cast a shadow in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. After the shadow hits an enemy or travels its maximum distance, Aegislash warps to the shadow’s location, dealing damage to nearby enemies and increase boost count by 1.

moves.name: Sacred Sword
moves.description: Aegislash thrusts its blade into the ground, creating a triangular zone. This zone erupts with a hidden power, dealing damage to enemies in the area and throws them. Also increases boost count by 1 for each enemy hit (capped at 2 for wilds, 4 for players). At the same time as the eruption, Aegislash slashes forward, dealing additional damage to enemies hit. For a short time after this slash hits, damage dealt by Aegislash partially ignores the Defense of all enemies.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description: Aegislash slashes with its blade twice in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. Follow up with a final rising slash that deals damage to enemies hit and throw them. Boost count increases by 1 when at least one of the three slashes hits.

moves.name: Iron Defense
moves.description: Envelops Aegislash in a powerful protective force for 1s. The protection disappears after blocking one attack or after 1s and then increases boost count by 1.

moves.name: Wide Guard
moves.description: Focus in place for a short time to create a great shield on Aegislash. When this shield appears, boost count increases by 1, granting a shield to Aegislash and shoves enemies in front. While this shield is active, enemy player attacks increase boost count by 1 for each different enemy player (capping at 4). When this move ends, shove enemies in front of Aegislash once again.

moves.name: Iron Head
moves.description: Dash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. Also increases boost count by 1, and protects Aegislash with a special shield for a short time afterward. This shield doesn’t protect from hindrances, but it can nullify damage. When the shield blocks an attack, it disappears and boost count is increased by 1.

moves.name: Coup de Grace
moves.description: Unleash a ground-splitting slash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The lower their remaining HP, the more damage this move deals. If this slash knocks out an enemy, boost count increases by 1.

passiveAbility.name: No Guard
passiveAbility.description: Honedge and Doublade do not gain the stat benefits of Stance Change. However, their boosted attack functions like Aegislash's Sword Stance boosted attack.

moves.name: Attack - Charcadet
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage to enemies within a cone area of effect in front of this Pokémon.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Charge forward, dealing damage to any enemy hit and leave them unable to act for a short time.

moves.name: Play Rough
moves.description: Increases movement speed for a short time and changes the next basic attack. When Azumarill performs their next basic attack, lunge at one enemy in range and deliver repeated blows; dealing damage to that target and leave it unable to act for a short time.

moves.name: Water Pulse
moves.description: Shoot a pulsing blast of water in front of Azumarill. When the blast of water hits an enemy, decrease that Pokémon’s movement speed and deal damage to all enemies in an area of effect around the initial target hit. The blast of water then automatically bounces to another target if one is available. Including the first target, the blast of water can bounce between up to 3 targets consecutively, and each hit behaves in the same way as the first. While the blast of water is traveling, Azumarill can perform a short rolling dash in a designated direction.

moves.name: Bubble
moves.description: Spray bubbles in a cone; dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decrease their movement speed for a short time. This move can be used while moving.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description: For a short time, four small whirlpools appear that swirl around Azumarill as they move. If a whirlpool hits an enemy, the whirlpool deals damage and restores Azumarill's HP. If a whirlpool hits an enemy player, an increased amount of HP is restored.

moves.name: Aqua Tail
moves.description: Increases the speed and area of effect of Azumarill's next 3 basic attacks. If these basic attacks hit from a distance, they also deal increased damage, restore Azumarill's HP, and can ignore the Defense stat and shield effects of enemies hit.

moves.name: Belly Bash
moves.description: Azumarill pounds their belly 3 times, granting a shield. With each pound, Azumarill loses HP in exchange for increased Attack. Azumarill can move while pounding their belly. Afterward, target an enemy and then charge at the target; dealing damage to them and throwing all enemies hit while charging.

passiveAbility.name: Huge Power
passiveAbility.description: When this Pokémon hits only a single enemy with a basic attack, a move, or their Unite Move, the hit is always a critical hit. However, when hitting two or more enemies at once with a basic attack, a move, or its Unite Move, the hits are never critical hits.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Blastoise’s third auto attack is empowered - dealing 3 instances of damage, slowing enemies hit and reducing Blastoise’s move cooldowns by 1 second each.

moves.name: Water Gun
moves.description: Attacks with a shot of water, shoving enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.description: Has the user attack by blasing out a huge volume of water, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and shoving them when it hits.

moves.name: Water Spout
moves.description: Spouts water toward the designated location, decreasing the movement speed of opposing Pokémon in the area of effect for a short time.

moves.name: Skull Bash
moves.description: Fiercely rams an opposing Pokémon and leaves it unable to act.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description: Has the user charge forward on a wave, shoving enemies and leaving them unable to act. The user becomes immune to hindrances while using this move and can jump in a designated direction once this move ends.

moves.name: Rapid Spin
moves.description: Has the user spin rapidly, changing the mechanics of its basic attacks as well as its Hydro Pump and Water Spout moves.

moves.name: Hydro Typhoon
moves.description: Has the user spout water to attack while spinning, throwing enemies in a large area. This also grants the user a shield.

passiveAbility.name: Torrent
passiveAbility.description: When the Pokémon is at half HP or less, its Attack and Sp. Attack are increased.

builds.name: Pump Spin (CDR Emblems)
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Surf Pump
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack after a set amount of time passes, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Pound
moves.description: Has the user attack by pounding in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when it hits.

moves.name: Egg Bomb
moves.description: Hurls an egg at the designated location. The egg then explodes, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throwing them.

moves.name: Helping Hand
moves.description: For a short time, greatly increases the user's and nearby allies movement speed and basic attack speed. While this move's effects last, all of the user's basic attacks become boosted attacks.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.description: Continually restores the user's and designated ally HP for a short time.

moves.name: Soft-Boiled
moves.description: Throws an egg to an ally, restoring its HP as well as the user's HP. A maximum of 3 uses can be kept in reserve for this move and cannot be used more than once every 2s.

moves.name: Safeguard
moves.description: Blissey grants both the targeted ally and themself a shield, purging hindrances and making both immune to hindrances as long as the shield lasts.

moves.name: Bliss Assistance
moves.description: Has the user dash to the designated ally to give it an egg, granting that ally a shield and increasing its Attack and Sp. Attack for a short time. The user also intercepts a portion of the damage received by that ally for a short time. While dashing, the user throws nearby enemies and those it comes in contact with.

passiveAbility.name: Natural Cure
passiveAbility.description: Removes all status condition from the Pokémon. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered.

moves.name: Attack - Charcadet
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Flame Burst
moves.description: Attack with a bursting flame. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.description: Attack with an intense blast of fire. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Fire Punch
moves.description: Punch with a fiery fist, dealing damage and shoving enemies when it hits. Also leaves the enemies it shoves burned.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description: Encircles enemies in the area of effect in a vortex of fire. After this move hits, it deals damage over time and decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.description: Blasts intense, all-consuming fire, dealing damage over time to enemies while the flames continue to burn on the ground and decreasing the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

moves.name: Flare Blitz
moves.description: Charge forward cloaked in fire, granting the user a shield and throwing enemies hit.

moves.name: Seismic Slam
moves.description: Fly up into the air, allowing the user to move freely over obstacles. While this move is being used, basic attacks deal increased damage and leave enemies burned. In addition, when dealing damage to an enemy, recover HP. Using this move again on an enemy will grab it and slam it onto the ground.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: While at half HP or less, critical-hit rate is increased.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: Shoot out a small flame, dealing damage to enemies, leaving them burned and decreasing their Attack for a short time.

moves.name: Pyro Ball
moves.description: Kick a ball of flame in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies and leaving them burned for a short time when this move hits.

moves.name: Blaze Kick
moves.description: Perform a fiery flying kick. This move is always a critical hit, and it shoves enemies and leaves them burned for a short time. In addition, become immune to hindrances while using this move.

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.description: Make a swift low sweep in the designated direction, dealing damage to any enemy it hits.

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.description: Charge forward cloaked in flame, dealing damage to any enemy hit.

moves.name: Feint
moves.description: Increases movement speed for a short time and become invincible.

moves.name: Blazing Bicycle Kick
moves.description: Create a giant ball of flame and kick it toward the designated location. The ball releases a fierce shock wave that deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. Also increases movement speed by 10% (stacks with the Unite Buffs) for 5s when it hits.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: When using a move, the next basic attack becomes a boosted attack. When hitting an enemy with a basic attack or move, a cinder is placed on that enemy. Attacking a cindered enemy a certain number of times will cause the cinder to flare, dealing damage to the enemy. When at half HP or less, critical-hit rate is increased by 10% and basic attack speed is increased by 20% for a short time.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.description: Has the user immediately restore HP to itself and nearby allies.

moves.name: Moonlight
moves.description: Clefable continually restores HP to themself and nearby allies for a short time. Clefable's movement speed is increased while this move is active.

moves.name: Draining Kiss
moves.description: Clefable attacks nearby enemies with an energy-draining kiss. Each enemy hit by the kiss receives damage and releases an air kiss. These air kisses will travel to a nearby ally with the lowest HP and restore their HP. If no allies are nearby, the air kisses will return to the user and restore Clefable's HP instead.

moves.name: Disarming Voice
moves.description: Has the user let out a charming cry, dealing damage to nearby enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Gravity
moves.description: Has the user create a gravity zone centered on itself that persists for a set amount of time. Inside the gravity zone, Clefable's auto attacks change and deal increased damage. Enemies in the zone have their movement speed decreased which becomes stronger whenever a set amount of time passes. These enemies are also unable to use dash moves. If an enemy attempts to enter the zone with a dash move, the dash move is stopped and that enemy is left unable to act for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Magic Guard
passiveAbility.description: This Pokémon receives a shield when restoring an ally Pokémon's HP. The strength of this shield is proportional to the amount of HP restored.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every fourth attack. This boosted attack spits Arrokuda or other Pokémon at the enemy and deals area damage near the target when it hits.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description: Creates a whirlpool that deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. The area of effect slowly shrinks, but the damage dealt slowly increases. Just before the whirlpool disappears, it decreases the movement speed of enemies in the area of effect for a short time. The user can also catch Arrokuda or other prey by entering the whirlpool.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description: Attacks with a wave that deals damage to enemies. Once the wave has traveled its full distance, it returns the way it came, dealing damage to enemies once again and pulling them back with the wave. The user can also catch Arrokuda or other prey by entering the wave.

moves.name: Dive
moves.description: Changes the designated area into a puddle and has the user dive to that area, dealing damage to enemies and shoving them when they're hit. The user also catches Arrokuda or other wild Pokémon as they emerge from the puddle. A maximum of 3 uses can be kept in reserve for this move.

moves.name: Feather Dance
moves.description: Decreases the Attack and movement speed of enemies for a short time.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.description: Creates a fierce wind, dealing damage to enemies that get caught in it and throws them.

moves.name: Air Slash
moves.description: Shoot out many blades of air while moving backward to create distance. Deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and reduces this move's cooldown when it hits.

moves.name: Gatling Gulp Missile
moves.description: Creates a puddle at the user's current location. The user continuously uses its mouth to grab Arrokuda from the puddle and spits them out to attack the nearest enemy. The user cannot move or use other moves while this move is in effect.

passiveAbility.name: Gulp Missile
passiveAbility.description: When Cramorant uses a move, it catches some form of prey in its mouth. Afterward, when Cramorant receives damage, it spits the prey out as a counterattack at an enemy. The type of prey and effect differ based on the user's HP.

moves.name: Rock Slide

moves.name: Rock Tomb
moves.description: Splits open the ground toward the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and creating a barricade of rock. Activating this move again removes the barricade.

moves.name: Shell Smash
moves.description: Convert a set percentage of Defense and Sp. Defense into Attack and Sp. Attack and increase movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Fury Cutter
moves.description: Slashes enemies with claws, dealing damage to them. Hitting the same enemy multiple times in succession with this move increases the damage dealt.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.description: Throws many small rocks. When a rock hits an enemy or when the rocks have flown their full distance, a zone of many levitating rocks is created dealing slowly-increasing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect.

moves.name: X-Scissor
moves.description: Dash forward with crossed claws, dealing damage to enemies multiple times and shoving them. Leaves enemies unable to act if they hit an object when shoved.

moves.name: Rubble Rouser
moves.description: Gain a shield for a short time and leave nearby enemies unable to act, dealing damage over time to them. If the user receives damage while this move is in effect, the move deals additional hits to nearby enemies.

passiveAbility.name: Sturdy
passiveAbility.description: Gains a stacking Def/SpDef buff for every 7% HP missing. Stacks up to 10 times.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Increases the speed of basic attacks by 3% for a short time after one hits. This effect can stack up to 4 times, and with every third activation of this effect, basic attacks become boosted attacks for a short time. These boosted attacks fire more quills, but the damage dealt by each quill is decreased.

moves.name: Leafage
moves.description: Pelts leaves in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. For a short time after using this move, Decidueye’s Attack and basic attack speed are increased.

moves.name: Razor Leaf
moves.description: Summons whirling razor leaves. For a short time after using this move, Decidueye’s Attack and basic attack speed are increased, and basic attacks can target multiple enemies for a short time.

moves.name: Spirit Shackle
moves.description: Charges power before firing quills in the designated direction. Damage dealt increases the longer power is charged, but movement speed is decreased while charging. If this move hits after power is charged to the maximum, it can stitch enemies to the ground. The affected Pokémon receives damage upon moving a set distance from that location, and their movement speed is decreased for a short time.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Deals damage to enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Leaf Storm
moves.description: Creates a tempest of sharp leaves, dealing damage to enemies it hits and decreases their movement speed for a short time. At point-blank range, it also shoves enemies hit.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.description: Creates a shadow that takes hold of one enemy in the area of effect, dealing damage and decreasing their movement speed and Defense for a short time. Also increases Decidueye’s movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Nock Nock
moves.description: Fires quills in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies. The move ends by unleashing a particularly large quill that deals damage to all enemies it hits. This move deals increased damage if the enemies remaining HP is low. While using this move, Decidueye becomes immune to hindrances but is unable to move.

passiveAbility.name: Long Reach
passiveAbility.description: Deals increased damage to distant enemies.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: Shoot a small flame in front of itself, dealing damage to enemies hit.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.description: Launch an intense, all-consuming fire in a forward direction; dealing damage to enemies hit. As the fire travels, it leaves behind a zone of flames in which a delayed explosion will occur, dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect.

moves.name: Mystical Fire
moves.description: Unleash a special, hot ball of fire in a forward direction. If it hits an enemy, the fire will explode; dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect.

moves.name: Will-o-Wisp
moves.description: Conjure up three sinister flames and launch them toward the designated area. These flames then explode; dealing damage to enemies hit by the explosion and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description: Create a vortex of fire in the designated area. The vortex automatically moves toward the nearest enemy, dealing damage-over-time to all enemies caught in the area for a short time and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 5s. After 4.5s passes or an enemy is caught in the center of the vortex; the flames increase in intensity. This increases the rate at which the flames deal damage and also leaves the enemies unable to act for 1s. This trapped damage ticks four times total. The Fire Spin will otherwise deal damage as it travels. Move placement on top of enemies will apply a "searching" tick and then apply "trapped" damage. A maximum of 9 ticks is possible.

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.description: Charge forward in the designated direction. If there are any enemies in range when the charge ends, summon three flames to attack. The flames deal damage and decrease enemy movement speed for a short time. This move can be used while also using Fire Blast or Mystical Fire.

moves.name: Fanciful Fireworks
moves.description: Deals damage-over-time to enemies in the designated area-of-effect. Enemies that are hit have decreased movement speed and weakened HP recovery effects for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: When using a move while at low remaining HP, deal additional damage with a fireball to enemies. This Ability goes on cooldown after it’s triggered.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing consecutive blows with each of the user's heads. When the sprint gauage is full, basic attacks will cause the Pokémon to charge in the direction they're facing and consume all of the sprint gauge. If this charging attack hits an enemy, all of the user's move cooldowns are reduced.

moves.name: Peck
moves.description: Move forward while jabbing with beaks. When the sprint gauge is full, instead charge forward while jabbing with beaks. Using this move fully consumes the sprint gauge.

moves.name: Tri Attack
moves.description: Dodrio attacks with their beaks in a cone in front of themself, dealing damage to enemies and applying one of the following random effects to enemies hit: decrease Attack and deal damage-over-time for a set amount of time, deacrease auto attack speed, or decrease movement speed. When the sprint gauge is full, Dodrio instead shoots out 3 projectiles in a designated direction. If a projectile hits an enemy, the project deals damage and applies one of the aforementioned effects based on its color. After this move is used, Dodrio's next auto attack deals additional damage and restores HP. Holds 2 uses in reserve and cannot be used more than once every 1s.

moves.name: Drill Peck
moves.description: Dodrio moves forward while striking with their sharp beaks multiple times, dealing damage to enemies hit. When the sprint gauge is full, Dodrio instead dashes forward while striking with their sharp beaks multiple times, dealing damage to enemies hit and shoving them. Using this move fully consumes the sprint gauge.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Dash forward, increasing the user's movement speed for a short time and deal damage to enemies hit. This move's cooldown is reduced if it hits an enemy.

moves.name: Agility
moves.description: Become immune to hindrances for a short time and fully charge the sprint gauge. Afterward, movement speed is increased for a short time, and the sprint gauge charges faster.

moves.name: Jump Kick
moves.description: Dodrio leaps forward while kicking. If this move makes contact with an enemy or obstacle, Dodrio leaps over it and stomps the ground when landing, dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time and the sprint gauge charges. If this move makes contact with an enemy, this move's cooldown is reduced.

moves.name: Triple Trample
moves.description: Dodrio runs to a designated location. While running, Dodrio is immune to hindrances. If Dodrio makes contact with an enemy while running, they are dealt damage and thrown into the air. When Dodrio arrives at the designated location, Dodrio gains increased Attack for a short time, is granted a shield, and the sprint gauge charges faster for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Run Away
passiveAbility.description: Movement speed is increased when enemies are nearby. While the Pokémon is moving, their sprint gauge charges. While the sprint gauge is full, movement speed is increased. If the Pokémon's movement speed decreases below a set speed, the sprint gauge will rapidly deplete. When this Pokémon scores a goal, the amount of Aeos energy deposited is evenly divided into equal portions for each head the Pokémon has.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Each time damage is dealt to enemies, boosted basic attack gauge increases. When the boosted basic attack gauge is full (after 8 instances of damage), the Pokémon's basic attacks become boosted attacks.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Lets out a sound blast in a forward direction. The shout explodes when it hits an enemy or after traveling a set distance, dealing damage in the area and decreasing their movement speed for a short time

moves.name: Dragon Breath
moves.description: Exhales a mighty gust in the designated direction, dealing damage to Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed. The gust also leaves the ground burning for a set amount of time. Pokémon in this area of effect take damage over tim and have their movement speed decreased for a short time. If this move is used while the uesr is flying with Dragon Dance, the mighty gust is exhaled along Dragon Dance's flight path, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and the decreasing their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.description: Hurls a shadowy blob in the designated direction, dealing damage to Pokémon it touches and applying a mark to them. When marked Pokémon are hit by Dragapult, they receive additional damage. The fourth time the marked Pokémon is hit, the mark is removed, but the damage dealt by the attack is further increased and the user recovers HP. After using this move, the user moves a short distance in a designated direction.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, increasing its basic attack speed for a short time

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.description: Flies in a circular pattern in the designated direction. While flying, it continuously deals damage to nearby enemies with basic attacks that deal less damage but have increased attack speed. If this move is used again while the user is flying, the user stops flying and moves a short distance in the designated direction. If the user knocks out an enemy, this move's cooldown is reset. If the user assists in a knock out, this move's cooldown is reduced by half. When this move is used, Dragon's Breath's cooldown is reset

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.description: For a short time, increases the user's movement speed and enters stealth. While the user is in stealth, the boosted basic attakck gauge increases. When stealth ends, Dragapult's basic attack speed is increased for a short time. After this move is learned, if the user knocks out an enemy, this move's cooldown is reset and Dragapult's Attack is increased by 6 until the end of battle. This Attack increase can stack up to 8 times.

moves.name: Dreep and Destroy
moves.description: Launches two Dreepy and each deals damage to different Pokémon in the area of effect. The lower the opposing Pokémon's remaining HP is, the more damage the Dreepy deal. If there is only one target in the area of effect, both Dreepy target that Pokémon and deal damage to it. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move. Dreepy may be fired once every 2 seconds. Neither Cooldown Reduction nor gaining Aeos Energy reduce the cooldown of Dreep and Destroy.

passiveAbility.name: Clear Body
passiveAbility.description: Reduces the duration of debuff effects inflicted on Dragapult by 50%

moves.name: Attack - Dratini
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, blasting water in front of Dratini, dealing increased damage, reducing the cooldown of Dratini's moves by 1s, and recover 5% max HP when this hits.

moves.name: Twister
moves.description: Creates a twister and releases it in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.description: Dash in a designated direction, in one of three cycling patterns. After using this move, grant a buff increasing attack speed, movement speed, Attack by 8% (capping at 24%), as well as increasing the stage of Hyper Beam. This buff stacks up to 3 times, and the duration is reset to full on reuse. All stacks are removed after a few seconds. Basic attacks reduce the cooldown of this ability by 1s.

moves.name: Extreme Speed
moves.description: Dash toward the designated location stopping upon contact with an enemy, dealing damage and throwing them.

moves.name: Dragon Breath
moves.description: Exhale a mighty gust in the designated direction. If this move hits an enemy, the user's next attack becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Hyper Beam
moves.description: Fires a beam of energy toward the targeted enemy after a delay, dealing damage to all enemies that it hits, as well as additional damage based on their Max HP. The move changes Stages based on the number of stacks of Dragon Dance that Dragonite has, from 0 to 3. The Max HP damage is 5%/10%/15%/20%, determined by the current Stage.  Dragonite cannot act during the duration of this move.

moves.name: Outrage
moves.description: Dragonite begins rampaging for 5s. This move starts with a ground stomp, dealing damage to enemies in an area around Dragonite. While rampaging, all of Dragonite's basic attacks become a melee boosted attack, alternating through the water, electric, and fire boosted attack types. When the rampage ends, Dragonite is left briefly unable to act.

moves.name: Draco Impact
moves.description: Briefly fly up in the air before crashing down with several comets on a designated area, dealing damage and throwing enemies in the area. The farther Dragonite flies, the more the Unite guage is consumed (25% at min disatance and 100% at max). Dragonite is unstoppable while using this move.

passiveAbility.name: Marvel Scale
passiveAbility.description: Increases Defense by 100 for 1.5s when afflicted by a status condition (Dratini and Dragonair only).

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, shooting a long beam that deals a large amount of damage to all enemies hit.

moves.name: Laser Focus
moves.description: Reduces damage received for a short time. Afterward, Duraludon's basic attacks deal additional damage to enemies hit. This buff expires after 8s or after 3 basic attacks.

moves.name: Flash Cannon
moves.description: Duraludon ruptures the ground around themself and in a designated direction; dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed by 50% for 1s. Afterward, go into "Cannon Mode" rooting Duraludon for 6s or if a basic attack is not made for 2.5s or this move can be cancelled early. While in Cannon Mode, basic attacks have longer range, attack speed is increased by 100% but decays by 20% per second over 5 seconds, dealing increased damage and splash damage. Exiting "Cannon mode" will prematurely remove the attack speed buff. Metal Claw, Stealth Rock, Dragon Tail, and boosted attacks can be used while in this mode and boosted attacks decrease the movement speed of enemies hit by 60% for 1s and also pierce.

moves.name: Dragon Pulse
moves.description: Charges power before dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect. Duraludon's movement speed is decreased while charging, but the longer power is charged, the wider the move's area of effect becomes and the more damage it deals. After learning this move, a damage marker will be attached to any enemy Duraludon damages. When Dragon Pulse hits a marked enemy, it deals additional damage to that target for each damage marker attached to it, then removes all of the damage markers. In addition, if this move knocks out an enemy, the cooldown is reduced by 50% and the next 3 basic attacks will each deal additional damage and further reduce this move's cooldown when they hit.

moves.name: Metal Claw
moves.description: Strike with sharp claws; dealing damage to enemies hit and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. After this move is used, Duraludon's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Dragon Tail
moves.description: Duraludon shoves enemies and moves itself backward a short distance. The next basic attack becomes a boosted attack. A maximum of two uses can be kept in reserve for this move. There is a 1.1s cooldown between uses. This move can penetrate through walls.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.description: Hurl a stone at the designated area, creating an invisible field of stones. The field deals damage over time to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time. If the hurled stone hits an enemy before the designated area, the area of effect will instead be centered on where the stone hit that Pokémon. Once an enemy takes damage from the field, it will become visible to enemies.  If an enemy takes damage from this move 4 times, that enemy becomes unable to move for a short time. After this move is used, Duraludon's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack. A maximum of two uses can be kept in reserve for this move. There is a 1.1s cooldown between uses.

moves.name: Revolving Ruin
moves.description: Fire a beam of light at the ground in a sweeping circle around Duraludon. If this beam hits an enemy, it deals damage to them, grants Duraludon a shield and increases their Attack by 8% for a short time. Both the shield effect and the Attack increase are strengthened for each enemy that is hit by the beam. Damage is dealt to any enemy in the area of effect after the beam of light is fired. A burning ring is also left where the beam of light touched the ground, and enemies that touch this ring take additional damage and have their movement speed decreased by 50% for 1s refreshing as damage continus to be taken from the burning ground.

passiveAbility.name: Heavy Metal
passiveAbility.description: Prevents Duraludon from being thrown or shoved by the first attempt to shove or throw them. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered (50s cd).

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, attaching a bit of cotton fluff to the enemy. The user's basic attacks against an enemy with cotton fluff on it deal increased damage and decreases the enemies movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Leafage
moves.description: Pelt the target with leaves, decreasing the movement speed of enemies for a short time when it hits.

moves.name: Pollen Puff
moves.description: Throws a Pollen Puff, which attaches to an enemy. The Pollen Puff restores HP for allies and deals damage to enemies.

moves.name: Leaf Tornado
moves.description: Attack with a tornado of sharp leaves, leaving a path in its wake that increases ally movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Synthesis
moves.description: Restores the HP of the user and nearby allies.

moves.name: Cotton Guard
moves.description: Protects the user and nearby allies with cotton. The cotton absorbs damage and when the move ends, the cotton restores some HP.

moves.name: Cotton Spore
moves.description: Gathers spores around the user, increasing the user's movement speed while this move is in effect. The spores burst after a short time, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect, throwing them, and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Cotton Cloud Crash
moves.description: Float into the air and become invincible. If used again, pound the ground, attacking and shoving enemies and restoring HP to allies in the area of effect.

passiveAbility.name: Cotton Down
passiveAbility.description: Damages an enemy and decreases its movement speed for a short time after receiving a certain amount of damage. When that happens, also recover HP and gain increased movement speed for a short time.

builds.name: Pollen Guard
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Aqua Cannon (Heal Cycle)
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

moves.name: Attack - Eevee
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

passiveAbility.name: Anticipation
passiveAbility.description: When Eevee would be affected by a hindrance, the hindrance is negated and Eevee becomes immune to hindrances for a short time (35s cd). Note: Hindrances include slows; multi-layered hindrance moves such as Pikachu's Volt Tackle will only have the very first launch negated.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every fifth attack, dealing increased damage and restoring the user's HP. Every time a basic attack or move hits an enemy, basic attack speed is increased.

moves.name: Sand Attack
moves.description: Hurls sand, narrowing the field of vision of enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time. Also increases movement speed and basic attack speed.

moves.name: Dig
moves.description: Burrow underground and move quickly in the designated direction, jumping out when coming in contact with an enemy or when traveling the maximum distance. This jump deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and throws them.

moves.name: Dragon Rush
moves.description: Back up to create distance before diving to attack in the designated direction, shoving enemies. The user can use Dragon Claw while creating distance at the start of this move to create a combo attack. (This move can crit)

moves.name: Bulldoze
moves.description: Stomp down on the ground, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

moves.name: Earthquake
moves.description: Jump high into the air and crash forcefully to the ground, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

moves.name: Dragon Claw
moves.description: Attack twice in front of itself using its claws. The first attack deals damage to enemies and throws them. The second attack deals increased damage. After the move ends, basic attack speed is increased for a short time. (This move can crit)

moves.name: Livid Outrage
moves.description: Has the user unleash a powerful chain attack while dashing forward. The final attack throws enemies but also leaves the user unable to act for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Rough Skin
passiveAbility.description: When struck by a melee attack, a portion of the damage received is reflected back at the attacker.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their Sp. Defense by 10% for a short time.

moves.name: Confusion
moves.description: Attacks straight in the designated direction.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.description: After hitting an enemy or traveling its maximum distance, deals damage over time to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed and Sp. Defense by 20%, stacking up to 3 times.

moves.name: Moonblast
moves.description: Has the user attack while moving back to create distance. When the move's blast hits, it deals damage to enemies in a cone and leaves the enemy closest to the user unable to act for a short time.

moves.name: Teleport
moves.description: Has the user warp to the designated area, increasing the damage dealt by one basic attack after warping.

moves.name: Psyshock
moves.description: Attacks the designated location three times. This move's cooldown is reduced each time one of these attacks hits an enemy.

moves.name: Future Sight
moves.description: Sets a delayed explosion. When the explosion hits an enemy, it reduces this move's cooldown.

moves.name: Fairy Singularity
moves.description: Warps Space in the designated area, drawing in enemies to the center. Shoves and deals damage to enemies the instant the warped space disappears.

passiveAbility.name: Synchronize
passiveAbility.description: When an enemy inflicts decreased movement speed or a damge-over-time condition on the Pokémon, the same is inflicted on that opponent. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, lunging at an enemy and dealing damage.

moves.name: Will-o-Wisp
moves.description: Shoot multiple sinister flames, dealing damage to enemies and leaving them burned when it hits.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.description: Hurl a shadowy blob at the target, decreasing the movement speed and Sp. Defense of enemies for a short time when it hits.

moves.name: Sludge Bomb
moves.description: Hurl unsanitary sludge to the designated area, leaving enemies poisoned when it hits.

moves.name: Lick
moves.description: Attacks with the user's tongue and pulls enemies toward the user.

moves.name: Dream Eater
moves.description: Puts enemies to sleep when it hits. If used again while a nearby enemy is asleep, the user appears behind the target and attacks, restoring HP and reducing the cooldown of Shadow Ball or Sludge Bomb.

moves.name: Hex
moves.description: Disappear and move to the designated location, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect when the user reappears. If this hits an enemy that is afflicted by a status condition, it deals increased damage and its cooldown is reduced.

moves.name: Phantom Ambush
moves.description: Jump to the designated area and start sneaking with increased movement speed. If this move is used again, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Levitate
passiveAbility.description: Increases movement speed by 10% when out of combat. (5s after leaving combat)

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and giving Glaceon 2 ice crystals when the boosted attack hits. Ice crystals last 5s and the duration is refreshed upon gaining additional crystals. Glaceon can hold a maximum of 8 ice crystals at a time.

moves.name: Swift
moves.description: Creates 4 stars around the user. For a short time afterward, each time the user hits an enemy with a basic attack, one of the stars (or 2 stars in the case of a boosted attack) will shoot out and deal additional damage to that enemy.

moves.name: Icicle Spear
moves.description: Has the user launch all of their stored ice crystals in rapid succession at the designated enemy. If no ice crystals are stored when this move is used, 2 ice crystals are instantly created and all crystals are launched. The crystals shatter when they hit the designated target, dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect. Launched ice crystals can hit enemies on the opposing team that are not the designated target of this move. If this occurs, the ice crystals will still shatter on impact and deal damage in an area in the same way. Ice crystals launched by this move deal increasing damage each time they hit the same enemy. After this move is used, the cooldown of Ice Shard or Freeze-Dry is reduced.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.description: Jump a short distance in the designated direction. Glaceon's next basic attack launches all stored ice crystals at an enemy, dealing damage to them. Glaceon then regains the same number of ice crystals that were launched. If Glaceon hits the same enemy with 1 or more ice crystals, that enemies movement speed is decreased for a short time. The more ice crystals that hit that target, the stronger this movement speed-decrease effect. If Glaceon has no ice crystals when this move is used, gain 2 ice crystals.

moves.name: Tail Whip
moves.description: The user wags their tail at an enemy, dealing damage and decreasing their Defense, Sp. Def, and movement speed for a short time. The user's next basic attack after using this move becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: Increase movement speed for a short time. Afterward, Glaceon's basic attack speed increases for a short time, and basic attacks change into attacks that hurl chunks of ice. These chunks of ice deal damage to enemies hit and decrease their movement speed for a short time. Every time a chunk of ice hits, the user gains 1 ice crystal. The user gains 2 ice crystals if this move is used while launching ice crystals with Icicle Spear, or if it's used after Icy Wind has been used, but before the user has launched all ice crystals with the next basic attack.

moves.name: Freeze Dry
moves.description: Glaceon shoots out a freezing burst of air in a forward direction, increasing Sp. Atk for a short time. . This burst explodes upon hitting an enemy or after traveling a set distance; dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect. For each enemy hit by the explosion, Glaceon gains 1 ice crystal. The explosion also leaves behind an ice zone. Enemies that enter this ice zone will have their movement speed decreased. If they remain in the ice zone for a set amount of time, they become frozen for a short time.

moves.name: Glacial Stage
moves.description: Leap up high, creating an ice zone in front of Glaceon that deals damage to enemies in the area-of-effect. While Glaceon is in the ice zone, movement speed is increased and Glaceon gains 1 ice crystal whenever a set amount of time passes. The movement speed of enemies in the ice zone is decreased.

passiveAbility.name: Run Away
passiveAbility.description: When Eevee would be affected by a hindrance, the hindrance is negated and becomes invincible for 1s. This Ability goes on cooldown after it’s triggered (70s cd).

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits and causing one berry to drop from Greedent's tail.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Leap to the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decrease their movement speed for a short time. If this move is used while Covet is active, no area can be designated for the user to leap to. Instead, while the user is running, damage is dealt in an area to enemies in front of Greedent. If Greedent has any berries stashed, consume all of them, reducing Tackle's cooldown for each berry consumed.

moves.name: Bullet Seed
moves.description: Spit berry seeds in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decrease their movement speed for a short time. The more berries Greedent has stashed, the more damage this move deals.

moves.name: Belch
moves.description: Deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decrease their movement speed for a short time. If Greedent has any berries stashed, consume all of them, reducing Belch's cooldown for each berry consumed.

moves.name: Defense Curl
moves.description: Grants Greedent a shield for a short time. In addition, a berry will drop in front of Greedent.

moves.name: Stuff Cheeks
moves.description: Greedent drops several berries, which can be eaten to recover HP. Any HP recovered that exceeds Greedent's max HP will be converted to a shield. If Greedent catches sight of a berry while using this move, movement speed is increased for a short time.

moves.name: Covet
moves.description: Greedent runs with all its might, becoming unstoppable and dealing damage to enemies hit and throwing them. While running, Greedent drops berries. Eating a dropped berry increases movement speed for a short time. The more berries eaten, the more movement speed is increased. In addition, Belch or Bullet Seed can also be used while running.

moves.name: Berry Belly Flop
moves.description: Greedent eats a berry to recover HP and then leaps to the designated area, dealing damage and throwing enemies within the area of effect. Greedent then eats a special berry, allowing an unlimited amount of berries to be stored for a short time and resets cooldowns of all moves.

passiveAbility.name: Cheek Pouch
passiveAbility.description: When Greedent eats a berry, recover HP after receiving the effects of the berry. At the same time, Greedent stashes another berry in its tail. Being hit by a single attack or combination of attacks will cause a berry to drop from Greedent's tail.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. At long range, a boosted attack deals increased damage to enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time. At close range, a boosted attack deals more damage the lower the enemies remaining HP is.

moves.name: Bubble
moves.description: Attack with a spray of bubbles, decreasing the movement speed of enemies when it hits.

moves.name: Water Shuriken
moves.description: Throw shurikens made of water in quick succession. Decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time and restores the user's HP when it hits. Also increases the user's movement speed while using this move.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description: Ride a wave, dealing damage to enemies and restoring the user's HP. If this move knocks out an enemy, its cooldown is reset. In addition, this move deals increased damage to enemies with low HP.

moves.name: Substitute
moves.description: Leaves behind a substitute doll for the user while it's moving forward.

moves.name: Double Team
moves.description: Quickly moves the user away from the current position, creating illusory copies of it to aid in battle.

moves.name: Smokescreen
moves.description: Creates a smokescreen and has the user roll away from its current location. Immediately afterward, the user begins sneaking and has its movement speed increased for a short time. This also makes its next basic attack a boosted attack.

moves.name: Waterburst Shuriken
moves.description: Throw a giant water shuriken toward the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when this move hits. The water shuriken then immediately explodes, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throws them. Once this move ends, the user may jump in a designated direction.

passiveAbility.name: Torrent
passiveAbility.description: While HP is at 50% or less, Attack and movement speed are increased.

passiveAbility.name: Rattled
passiveAbility.description: When damaged, increases movement speed by 5% for 3s (up to 5 times; maximum 25%).

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies by unleashing a beam of light. When Hoopa is unbound, every attack becomes a boosted attack and deals damage to up to 2 additional nearby enemies.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Deals damage to enemies in the designated area of effect, leaving them unable to act for a short time.

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.description: Hoopa creates a portal ring under itself and warps to a designated location, dealing damage to nearby enemies at that location and shoving them. Hoopa then shoots two sinister flames that deal damage to enemies hit and decreases their movement speed for a short time. This move can be used a second time within a set amount of time. If used a second time, Hoopa can return to the initial location they warped from. When using this move, if there is a nearby ally that is linked by Trick, that ally can also warp to the initial ring's location. The ally that warps in this way will recover HP.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.description: Unleash a shadowy blob in front of Hoopa, dealing damage to enemies hit and decreases their movement speed and Sp. Def for a short time. If Hoopa then hits the same enemy with a move or boosted attack within a set amount of time, it deals additional damage and leaves the enemy unable to act for a short time. When using this move, if there is a nearby ally linked by Trick, this move will also unleash a shadowy blob at the same target from that ally's location.

moves.name: Confusion
moves.description: Unleash a telekinetic force in the designated direction, dealing damage to the first enemy hit. The telekinetic force clings to that enemy and then causes a delayed explosion. The explosion deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Hyperspace Hole
moves.description: Hoopa creates a large ring at the designated location, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect. After a set amount of time, Hoopa and any allies in the area of effect will return to their base, and their movement speed will be increased for a short time. These allies can also warp back to where the ring was created. An intact ally forward goal zone can also be designated as the location where the ring is created. Creating the ring on this forward goal zone of the top path will also create a ring on the forward goal zone of the bottom path, and vice versa. All allies, including Hoopa, can use these rings to warp between the two goal zones, and their movement speed will be increased for a short time after warping. After an ally warps, there is a set cooldown before that ally can use these rings again. If a path's forward goal zone is destroyed, the middle goal zone on the same path will take its place. This move cannot be used on base goal zones.

moves.name: Trick
moves.description: Hoopa creates a link between itself and an ally using a ring, increasing both of their movement speeds and granting them each a shield for a short time. When Hoopa uses Shadow Ball or performs a basic attack, the ring on the linked ally also unleashes the same move or attack. Hoopa can also use this move on themself, increasing movement speed and granting a shield for a short time. Additionally, it increases the damage dealt by Shadow Ball.

moves.name: Rings Unbound
moves.description: Transforms Hoopa into Hoopa Unbound for a short time, increasing max HP and creating a ring at the designated location. Each ally can warp to the ring's location one time. As Hoopa Unbound, moves change to Hyperspace Fury and Psybeam. Hoopa Unbound cannot score goals or activate the Magician ability.

passiveAbility.name: Magician
passiveAbility.description: In battles where the map is divided into an ally team side and an opposing team side, this ability creates a hole under one of the berries on the opposing team's side (chosen at random) and warps it in front of Hoopa. If there are no berries, but there is Aeos Energy on the ground, then some energy is warped in front of Hoopa instead. In the event that no berries from the opposing team's side are warped, the cooldown of this ability is reduced.

builds.name: Phantom Trick
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Mobility for Survivability

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage with an increased critical-hit rate.

moves.name: Tearful Look
moves.description: Decreases the Attack and Sp. Atk of the target Pokémon by 20% for 3s. Inteleon gains a critical counter and increases its movement speed.

passiveAbility.name: Sniper
passiveAbility.description: When this Pokémon stays near a wall for 1s it becomes camouflaged, making opposing Pokémon unable to target it, and starts gaining critical counters (up to a maximum of 3). A critical counter is gained as soon as Inteleon is camouflaged, with a new counter gained every 3s while camouflaged. Hitting any Pokémon prevents Inteleon from becoming camouflaged for 3s. When a critical counter is consumed, Inteleon's next attack or move that can critically strike is guaranteed to be a critical hit.

builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Cheer Breath
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Dragon-kinesis
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

builds.name: Draco-kinesis

moves.name: Attack - Eevee
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing additional damage.

passiveAbility.name: Run Away
passiveAbility.description: Eevee has 10% increased movement speed when out of combat. (5s after leaving combat)

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, performing a combo attack with a bone. Deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and throws them.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Has the user lunge forward at a speed that makes it almost invisible, dealing damage to enemies it comes in contact with.

moves.name: Extreme Speed
moves.description: Charge forward with breathtaking speed. If this move hits an enemy from point-blank range, its cooldown is reset and it restores the user's HP. However, the cooldown cannot be continually reset by using this move on the same enemy multiple times in succession.

moves.name: Power-Up Punch
moves.description: Charges power before unleashing a powerful attack. While the user is charging power, its movement speed is decreased but its Attack slowly increases and the damage it receives is reduced. The user then charges in the designated direction and releases this move, dealing more damage the lower the enemies remaining HP is. The next basic attack becomes a boosted attack if the move hits. This move's cooldown is reduced every time one of the user's moves hits.

moves.name: Meteor Mash
moves.description: Blast forward with a punch like a comet, dealing damage to enemies and shoving them.

moves.name: Bone Rush
moves.description: Performs a combo attack with a bone, dealing multiple damaging blows to enemies and shoving them. The final attack sends the bone flying. If used again while the bone is traveling, the user rushes to the location of the bone, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

moves.name: Close Combat
moves.description: Unleash a combo attack, dealing multiple blows to enemies and shoving them.

moves.name: Aura Cannon
moves.description: Deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. Increases the damage dealt by the user's next Power-Up Punch after using this move.

passiveAbility.name: Steadfast
passiveAbility.description: While at low HP, gain a shield and increased movement speed. (30s cooldown)

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits. This boosted attack also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

moves.name: Karate Chop
moves.description: Attack opposing Pokémon with a sharp chop.

moves.name: Close Combat
moves.description: Unleash a series of punches in the designated direction, dealing increased damage with the last punch. The user can move while using this move and becomes immune to hindrances.

moves.name: Cross Chop
moves.description: Has the user deliver a double chop with forearms crossed while dashing forward. This increases the user's critical-hit rate.

moves.name: Bulk Up
moves.description: Become immune to hindrances for a short time. Increases movement speed, basic attack speed, and Attack. The next basic attack also becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Dynamic Punch
moves.description: Jump to the designated location, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaving them unable to act when it hits. After using this move, the user becomes immune to hindrances, their movement speed and basic attack speed is increased. The next basic attack also becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Submission
moves.description: Increases movement speed and become immune to hindrances. When the next basic attack hits, the attack deals increased damage and slams the enemy onto the ground, leaving it unable to act. Once this move ends, the user's critical-hit rate and basic attack speed are increased for a short time.

moves.name: Barrage Blow
moves.description: Increases Machamp's movement speed by 5%, Attack by 30%, Defense by 200, and Sp. Defense by 200 for 10s. If used again, unleash a combo attack, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and shoving them. The final blow deals double the damage of the previous hits.

passiveAbility.name: Guts
passiveAbility.description: Increases Attack when afflicted by a status condition.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage and freezing enemies for a short time when it hits. Mamoswine's basic attacks deal increased damage for a short time to enemies recently frozen with one of Mamoswine's moves.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: Hurls 3 chunks of ice at the designated location, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If an enemy is hit by all three chunks, they're left frozen for a short time.

moves.name: Icicle Crash
moves.description: Drops icicles on the designated location, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. The final icicle shatters after a set amount of time or when hit by Mamoswine's other moves or boosted attacks, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaving them frozen. If the icicle is shattered by Tackle or High Horsepower, the ground is covered in ice, which increases the movement speed of allies that run over it. The next basic attack is boosted.

moves.name: Ice Fang
moves.description: Uses cold-infused fangs to throw the opposing Pokémon closest to the user, dealing damage and leaving them frozen for a short time. The user can then designate a direction to slam the thrown Pokémon forward or backward, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaving them frozen for a short time. The next basic attack is boosted.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Mamoswine rushes recklessly in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies they hit and throws them in the air.

moves.name: High Horsepower
moves.description: Mamoswine rushes recklessly in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies they hit and shove them. Mamoswine then stomps their feet, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaves them unable to act for a short time. This stomping deals increased damage to frozen enemies.

moves.name: Earthquake
moves.description: Mamoswine leaps up in the designated direction and lands forcefully, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and pulling them toward Mamoswine.

moves.name: Mammoth Mash
moves.description: Mamoswine jumps to the designated location and becomes immune to hindrances - then repeatedly stomps the ground, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time with each stomp. The final stomp throws enemies in the air.

passiveAbility.name: Thick Fat
passiveAbility.description: When Mamoswine deals damage, Defense and Sp. Def are increased for 3s, stacking up to 3 times. When Mamoswine uses Ice Shard, Icicle Crash or Ice Fang, the next basic attack is boosted. If any of these moves creates a freezing area of effect inside an ally goal zone, the goal-scoring speed of enemies is decreased.

passiveAbility.name: Synchronize
passiveAbility.description: Each time Mew uses a move, Mew and nearby allies have their movement speed increased by 15% for 2s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: When Mewtwo Mega Evolves, deal increased damage and becomes a boosted attack with every third attack.

passiveAbility.name: Pressure
passiveAbility.description: When Mewtwo deals damage to an opposing Pokémon with a basic attack, the Mega gauge increases. Each time the Mega gauge increases, Mewtwo attack is increased by 2% and its Defense and Sp. Def are increased by 2%, up to 10 times. If Mewtwo is Lv. 5 or higher, and the Mega gauge has stacked at least 9 times, it Mega Evolves. The Mega Evolution lasts 15s and increases Mewtwo attack by an additional 10%, Defense and Sp. Def by an additional 10%, its max HP by 10% and its movement speed by 5%.

moves.name: Barrier

moves.name: Power Swap
moves.description: Swaps the user's Defense and Sp. Defense stats with those of another Pokémon for a short time when it hits. Swapping with an enemy deals damage over time and decreases their movement speed while increasing the user's movement speed for a short time. Swapping with an ally increases the movement speed of that ally and the user for a short time.

moves.name: Icy Wind

moves.name: Aurora Veil

moves.name: Snow Globe
moves.description: Attacks with a chilly blast of snow and ice, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect when it hits. Deals increased damage to enemies that are frozen.

passiveAbility.description: Causes snow to fall on an enemy, dealing damage to it and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for .75s. moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If Sableye is in stealth when it hits an opposing Pokémon with a boosted attack, it will deal damage and apply a fear effect. Opposing Pokémon affected by fear will be forced to move away from Sableye. When the user enters stealth, it will charge boosted attack immediately and hold it.

moves.name: Thief
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to any Pokémon it hits and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If this move hits an enemy Pokémon, it steals a small amount of their Aeos energy. If those Pokémon do not have any Aeos energy, they will be left unable to act for a short time.

moves.name: Knock Off
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction and then back again while attacking around itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit by the attacks and leaving them unable to act for a short time. For a short time afterward, this move can be used again. If it is, the user attacks in front of itself with its claws, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and throwing them. When either the first or second stage of this move hits opposing Pokémon, those Pokémon will drop some of their collected Aeos energy, and for a short time, they’ll be unable to pick up Aeos energy. When either stage of this move hits opposing Pokémon that do not have Aeos energy, those Pokémon will be left unable to act—and for a longer duration. While using this move, the user receives reduced damage.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.description: For a short time, increases the user’s movement speed and has it enter stealth. While this move is active, the user’s next boosted basic attack deals additional damage. While this move is active, if the user exits stealth and is not immobilized by a hindrance, it will be able to enter stealth again.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Attacks in a cone in front of itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If this move hits opposing Pokémon from behind, it deals increased damage and applies a greater decrease in movement speed.

moves.name: Feint Attack
moves.description: Has the user throw dummy Aeos energy to a designated location. While dummy Aeos energy remains at a location, that location and the area around it will be visible to the user. Dummy Aeos energy can remain at up to five locations at a time. If an opposing Pokémon picks up dummy Aeos energy, that energy explodes, dealing damage over time to that Pokémon and decreasing its movement speed for a short time. A maximum of three uses can be kept in reserve for this move.

moves.name: Confuse Ray
moves.description: Fires a sinister ray in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. If this move hits Pokémon from the opposing team, it also leaves them confused. While confused, Pokémon are left unable to act and start continuously attacking nearby Pokémon with basic attacks. Confused Pokémon will target nearby Pokémon in the following order of priority: first, their ally Pokémon; then, wild Pokémon; last, Pokémon on Sableye's team.

moves.name: Chaos Glower
moves.description: Shoot light from both eyes, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in an cone in front of itself. Pokémon from the opposing team hit by this move who are facing the user are left unable to act and start preparing to return to base. If they take damage before returning to base, the return effect is cancelled, and they are left unable to act for a short time. Opposing Pokémon hit by this move who are not facing the user have their movement speed decreased for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Prankster
passiveAbility.description: When Sableye is outside the visual range of Pokémon from the opposing team, it enters stealth and its movement speed increases. When Sableye enters the visual range of a Pokémon from the opposing team, it does not immediately become visible but instead remains in stealth for a short time. This stealth lasts longer when approaching enemy Pokémon from behind. The Pokémon with this Ability exits stealth when it attacks.

passiveAbility.name: Technician
passiveAbility.description: After using a move, the next basic attack will change to deal 2 attacks instead. The second attack deals reduced damage.

moves.description: Begin performing a recital, granting the user and nearby allies a shield as well as removing all status conditions from the affected allies and make them immune to hindrances for a short time.

passiveAbility.name: Cute Charm
passiveAbility.description: When hit by an enemies attack at close range, make that enemy infatuated for a short time. Infatuated enemies become enthralled and approach Wigglytuff against their will. The effects of this ability have a cooldown and cannot trigger on the same enemy in quick succession.

builds.name: Bolt Cannon
builds.emblemName: Special Attack Cooldown Reduction - Bulk for Survivability

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and paralyzing the enemy while restoring some of Zeraora's HP.

moves.name: Agility
moves.description: Perform a quick dash and increase basic attack speed for a short time afterward.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.description: Perform a high-speed dash, dealing damage to enemies hit and increase basic attack speed for a short time. Using this move again within a set period of time will allow the user to immediately dash back to the original position.

moves.name: Spark
moves.description: Leap at an enemy dealing damage to them. If using your basic attack before reaching the targeted enemy, instead leap at the closest enemy and deal damage to it. This move can be used 3 times before going on cooldown.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Pounce at an enemy and attack with sharp claws. This move's final attack throws enemies.

moves.name: Discharge
moves.description: Release an electrical discharge, dealing damage to nearby enemies and grant the user a shield when it hits. If this move hits enemies that are paralyzed, it pulls them in toward the user once the move ends, dealing damage to them once again and leaving them unable to act.

moves.name: Wild Charge
moves.description: Charge in the designated direction. If this move hits an enemy, unleash a combo attack that also deals a set amount of damage to itself. If the user hit an enemy with Volt Switch, Spark, or a boosted attack before using this move, the number of attacks in the combo is increased.

moves.name: Plasma Gale
moves.description: Unleash a blast of lightning, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throw them. This also creates a zone of plasma that increases the user's basic attack range and damage dealt while inside this zone.

passiveAbility.name: Volt Absorb
passiveAbility.description: Gain an electric charge when receiving damage, converting a portion of that damage into additional Attack.

builds.name: Discharge Switch
builds.emblemName: Charging Charm (Less Critical Rate, Slight higher bulk)

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description: Dash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and leaving them unable to act for a short time. If this move hits an enemy near the end point of the dash, they will be thrown instead of being left unable to act.

moves.name: Cut
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies, and restoring the Zoroark's HP.

moves.name: Fury Swipes
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies. If this move hits an enemy, for a short time afterwards, this move can be activated again.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.description: For a short time, change the user’s normal movement to dash attacks. After performing a dash attack, the user’s next auto attack changes to a special auto attack. During this move’s effect duration, whenever Zoroark hits an enemy with other moves or special auto attacks, this move’s effect duration increases and the user is able to use Night Slash again. This move’s effect duration ends if the user moves when it’s unable to use Night Slash. During this move’s effect duration, if Zoroark hits enemies with a total of six moves and/or special auto attacks, Zoroark will jump into the air and then while landing, slash a set area-of-effect, dealing damage to enemies. Zoroark recovers HP if they hit enemies with this slashing attack. While jumping, the user is able to use Shadow Claw or Cut to move a set distance.

moves.name: Feint Attack
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies and reducing all of the user’s move cooldowns. If this move hits an enemy, for a short time, the location where the dash started is marked, and the user is able to use this move again; returning to the marked location and dealing damage to enemies. A new mark is left where the dash started. As long as there is a mark, if the user uses another move, the mark will move to where the move was used. If the user hits enemies four times with either Feint Attack or other moves without interrupting the chain of marking, the next use of Feint Attack changes. If this changed form of Feint Attack is used, Zoroark leaps at the designated enemy and deals damage to them before landing in the designated direction.

moves.name: Nightfall Daze
moves.description: Release dark shockwaves, dealing damage to enemies hit. Three shockwaves are released, and each one has an increasingly larger area-of-effect. Zoroark is immune to hindrances while releasing shockwaves.

passiveAbility.name: Illusion
passiveAbility.description: The user takes the form of a random wild Pokémon or Pokémon from the opposing team. The user returns to their original form when taking damage or using an auto attack or move (15s cd).
